details.quote: We use pixel tags in our emails to understand how members interact with our service. Our use of pixel tags helps us understand when links within messages are clicked, or the emails are opened.
We may also use pixel tags placed on Advertiser sites and applications to support advertising.
details.what_is_tracked: User activity on advertiser sites and applications

mentions_legales.label: Dénomination sociale (nom/raison sociale)
mentions_legales.quote: Information about the specific Netflix entity (or entities) that are responsible for your personal information (known as the “data controller” in certain countries) is available at netflix.com/legal/corpinfo.

mentions_legales.label: Adresse de courrier électronique
mentions_legales.quote: For questions about this Privacy Statement, our use of your personal information, or how to exercise your privacy rights, please contact our Data Protection Officer/Privacy Office at privacy@netflix.com.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Présence d'une politique de confidentialité
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote:
# Privacy Statement

This Privacy Statement explains how we collect, use, and disclose your personal information when you interact with the "Netflix service"

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Identité du Responsable de Traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Information about the specific Netflix entity (or entities) that are responsible for your personal information (known as the “data controller” in certain countries) is available at netflix.com/legal/corpinfo.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Coordonnées du DPO
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: For questions about this Privacy Statement, our use of your personal information, or how to exercise your privacy rights, please contact our Data Protection Officer/Privacy Office at privacy@netflix.com.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Types de données collectées + raison
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote:
We collect the following categories of personal information about you:

- Personal details: When you register with the Netflix service, we collect your contact information (such as your email address) and authentication information for your login (such as a password). Depending on your interaction with the Netflix service, we also collect one or more of the following: first and last name, phone number, postal address, gender, date of birth, and other identifiers you provide to us.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Base légale du traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote:
We rely on the following legal bases for collecting and using the personal information described in this Privacy Statement:

- Contractual necessity: We rely on contractual necessity to collect and use personal information for the following purposes described in this Privacy Statement: to provide our service (when processing members' personal information); to administer and operate our business; to enable Partner integrations and promotions; to comply with law and enforce the Netflix Terms of Use (when we enforce against members who have violated the Netflix Terms of Use); and to support advertisements (on our ads supported subscription plan).

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Caractère obligatoire/facultatif + conséquences
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: If we have collected and are processing your personal information with your consent, then you can withdraw your consent at any time. Withdrawing your consent will not affect the lawfulness of any processing we conducted prior to your withdrawal, nor will it affect processing of your personal information conducted in reliance on lawful processing grounds other than consent.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Durée de conservation des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We retain personal information for as long as necessary to fulfill the following purposes: to provide our service; to administer and operate our business; to research, analyze, and improve our services; to send marketing and informational messages; to support advertisements; for safety, security, and fraud prevention; and to comply with law and enforce the Netflix Terms of Use.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Destinataires des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote:
We may disclose your personal information to the following parties:

- The Netflix family of companies: We share your personal information among the Netflix family of companies (see help.netflix.com/legal/corpinfo) as needed for the following purposes: to provide our service; to administer and operate our business; to research, analyze, and improve our services; to enable Partner integrations and promotions; to send marketing and informational messages; to support advertisements; for safety, security, and fraud prevention; and to comply with law and enforce the Netflix Terms of Use.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Prise de décision automatisée
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: You may have a right not to be subject to a decision made solely using automated means, where such decision would have a legal effect on you or produce a similarly significant effect.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Sécurité des données (art. 32 RGPD)
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We use reasonable administrative, logical, physical, and managerial measures to safeguard your personal information against loss, theft, and unauthorized access, use and modification.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Collecte indirecte : catégories concernées
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote:
We collect your personal information from the following sources:

- From Partners whose products and services you use: We may collect the following categories of personal information about you from third parties whose services you use to access, pay for, or interact with the Netflix service (“Partners”): personal details, payment details, usage information, and device and network information.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Collecte indirecte : source des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote:
We collect your personal information from the following sources:

- From Partners whose products and services you use: We may collect the following categories of personal information about you from third parties whose services you use to access, pay for, or interact with the Netflix service (“Partners”)... These sources include: - Service Providers such as vendors, agents, and contractors that collect or provide personal information to Netflix in connection with services they perform on our behalf

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'introduire une plainte (CNIL)
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: You have the right to complain to a data protection authority about our processing of your personal information but we encourage you to first contact us with any questions or concerns.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit de rectification
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: You have a right to confirm whether we process your personal information and to access and receive a copy of the personal information we process about you. You may also correct or update out-of-date or inaccurate personal information or request that we delete personal information that we hold about you.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'accès
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: You have a right to confirm whether we process your personal information and to access and receive a copy of the personal information we process about you.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à l'effacement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: You may also correct or update out-of-date or inaccurate personal information or request that we delete personal information that we hold about you.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à la limitation du traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: You can object to or request that we restrict processing of your personal information.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à la portabilité
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: You can request portability of or download a copy of your personal information.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'opposition
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: You can object to or request that we restrict processing of your personal information.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Date de dernière mise à jour de la politique
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: **Last Updated:** April 10, 2026

cookies.label: Présence d'une politique cookies
cookies.quote:
__Section D: Cookies and other Technologies__

We, our Service Providers, Netflix Marketing Providers, and Advertising Companies use cookies, other similar technologies (such as pixel tags), hashed identifiers, and resettable device identifiers for various reasons.

cookies.label: Retrait du consentement simple et à tout moment
Information sur le Responsable de Traitement
cookies.quote: Information about the specific Netflix entity (or entities) that are responsible for your personal information (known as the “data controller” in certain countries) is available at netflix.com/legal/corpinfo.

cookies.label: Finalité des cookies (claire et complète)
cookies.quote: We use these types of technologies for various reasons, including to provide our service (for example, by making it easy to access our service by remembering you when you return); to administer and operate our business, to research, analyze and improve our services (for example, to improve site performance, monitor visitor traffic and actions on our site, and to test the effectiveness of our user interface); to send marketing and informational messages (for example, to deliver and tailor our marketing, and to understand interactions with our emails, marketing, and marketing on third party services); to support advertisements; for safety, security and fraud prevention; and to comply with law and enforce the Netflix Terms of Use.

cookies.label: Détail des finalités (2e niveau)
cookies.quote: We use these types of technologies for various reasons, including to provide our service (for example, by making it easy to access our service by remembering you when you return); to administer and operate our business, to research, analyze and improve our services (for example, to improve site performance, monitor visitor traffic and actions on our site, and to test the effectiveness of our user interface); to send marketing and informational messages (for example, to deliver and tailor our marketing, and to understand interactions with our emails, marketing, and marketing on third party services); to support advertisements; for safety, security and fraud prevention; and to comply with law and enforce the Netflix Terms of Use.

cookies.label: Détail des types de cookies déposés
cookies.quote: Cookies are small data files that are commonly stored on your device when you access websites and online services. The text in a cookie contains a string of numbers and letters that may uniquely identify a device and can contain other information as well. We use other technologies such as browser storage and plugins (for example, HTML5, IndexedDB, and WebSQL). Like cookies, these other technologies may store small amounts of data on a device. Pixel tags often work in conjunction with cookies.

cookies.label: Outil de mesure d'audience mentionné
cookies.quote: to research, analyze and improve our services (for example, to improve site performance, monitor visitor traffic and actions on our site, and to test the effectiveness of our user interface)

cookies.label: Consentement requis pour l'outil statistique
cookies.quote: If you are eligible for Behavioral Advertisements, a “Behavioral Advertising” setting will be available to you in the “Privacy and data settings” menu (for the relevant profile) of the “Account” section of our website that you can adjust at any time.

transferts_hors_ue.label: Existence de transferts hors UE + destinataires
transferts_hors_ue.quote: Netflix operates from various countries around the world, as do its Service Providers, Partners, and other third parties to whom we may need to disclose your personal information, as described above. This means that when you use or interact with Netflix, your personal information may be transferred to other countries that have different data protection laws than those where you reside.

transferts_hors_ue.label: Stockage cloud hors UE + localisation serveurs

identite.quote: - first and last name, phone number, postal address, gender, date of birth, and other identifiers you provide to us.
identite.purpose: Identification et personnalisation du service Netflix

contact.quote: - contact information (such as your email address)

compte_auth.quote: - authentication information for your login (such as a password)

paiement.quote: - Payment Method (as defined in the Netflix Terms of Use), and other information to process your payments (such as when you subscribe to the Netflix service), including your payment history, billing address, and gift cards and Offers (as defined in the Netflix Terms of Use) you have redeemed.
paiement.purpose: Traitement des paiements et gestion des abonnements

localisation.quote: - IP addresses (which can be used to tell us the general location of your device, such as your city, state/province, and postal code);
localisation.purpose: Personnalisation du service et optimisation des recommandations

appareil_technique.purpose: Fonctionnement du service, sécurité et personnalisation

usage_comportement.quote: - information about your interaction with the Netflix service (including playback events, such as play, pause, etc.); choices made when engaging with interactive titles, your Netflix game activity (such as gameplay, game use and interaction information, and progress or saved game information); Netflix viewing and gaming history; search queries on the Netflix service; voice inputs (including transcripts and recordings) when using voice-related features; and other information about your use and interaction with the Netflix service (such as app clicks, text input, page views, time and duration of access, and camera/photo access for QR-code functionality and Netflix games features).
usage_comportement.purpose: Analyse du comportement utilisateur pour améliorer le service

contenus_utilisateur.quote: - Your input of user-generated content within a Netflix game, such as drawings, uploaded content (such as photos/selfies, videos, sound recordings, or other content), or your selection of content from a third party service.
contenus_utilisateur.purpose: Gestion des contenus créés par l'utilisateur dans les jeux Netflix

communications.quote: - If you communicate with Netflix (such as contacting customer support via online chat or voice call), or engage in our surveys or feedback requests (such as when you cancel), we collect the contents of such communications.
communications.purpose: Gestion des communications avec les utilisateurs

donnees_tiers.quote: - personal details, payment details, usage information, and device and network information. [...] Partners may provide us: - personal details (such as your email address), device and network information (such as IP addresses, device IDs, or other unique identifiers), or other personal information in order to activate the Netflix service, or present Netflix content to you through portions of the Partner’s user interface;
donnees_tiers.purpose: Données obtenues via des partenaires pour activer le service ou faciliter l'accès

mineurs.quote: - You must be at least 18 years of age or older (or the age of majority in your country of residence) to subscribe to the Netflix service. Individuals under this age may only use the service with the involvement, supervision, and approval of a parent or legal guardian.
mineurs.purpose: Protection des données des mineurs et contrôle parental

legal_bases.data: personal details, payment details, Netflix account/profile information, usage information, advertising information, device and network information, communications
